query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "omniretrieval: unified retrieval across heterogeneous knowledge source" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (b) and (f) by measuring the performance of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems on heterogeneous knowledge sources (visual documents) across multiple languages, which directly addresses the core variables (retrieval across heterogeneous sources, multilingual capability) of the user's question regarding "OmniRetrieval" and its linguistic extensions.
